category_sources: Official README describes Tock as a time tracking command-line tool with plaintext logs and terminal UI.
source_facts.description says tock is a powerful time tracking tool for the command-line.
docs_sources: Official repository README contains features, quick start, commands, configuration, theme, file format, and shell usage sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/kriuchkov/tock, so repo is intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official README lists command-line time tracking, interactive TUI, plaintext storage, tags, and Go installation.
